summary: Subraya la oportunidad histórica para la inversión española en un país que se consolida como el principal mercado del continente africano. Leer

title: En juego 17.000 millones de euros en ventas de aceite de oliva, jamón, vino o maquinaria a EEUU
summary: La amenaza de Donald Trump de cortar cualquier relación comercial con España ponen en la cuerda floja 17.000 millones de euros en exportaciones al país norteamericano. EEUU vende a España bienes por valor de 30.000 millones cada año. Leer

summary: El empeño de Trump en conseguir que los buques vuelvan a transitar por el estrecho de Ormuz sigue chocando con la resistencia de Irán a ceder del control. Leer

title: Trump pide una lista de productos españoles para un posible embargo
summary: El líder republicano quiere detener "completamente" el comercio bilateral con España porque es "una causa perdida" y "un aliado terrible en la OTAN". Leer

title: El FMI nombra a Silvana Tenreyro como su próxima economista jefe
summary: La exfuncionaria del Banco de Inglaterra será la segunda mujer que ocupa este cargo. Leer

title: MAP: How to find out where Spain's active wildfires are
summary: Spain experiences wildfires over summer, threatening homes and causing devastation across thousands of hectares. Here's how to use Google to find out where active blazes are occurring.

title: Nine things you didn't know about Spain's San Fermín bull run festival
summary: Pamplona's San Fermín is the world's most famous bull-themed festival. Hate it or love it, there are lots of fascinating  facts about the event that you probably didn't know, from banned fountain jumping to bull runs for kids.

title: Trump backtracks on summit comments and says Spain 'very generous'
summary: After threatening to sever all trade ties with Spain at a NATO summit on Wednesday, US President Trump had within hours already changed his tune.

title: Spanish court refuses to refer migrant amnesty to Europe
summary: Despite complaints from regional governments, the controversial mass regularisation process will not be passed up the legal chain to an EU court - for now.

title: Barcelona sets new heat record at 40.7C
summary: Barcelona registered a maximum temperature of 40.7C on Wednesday, its highest figure in 112 years of records, weather agencies said as another heatwave struck Spain.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Thursday
summary: Prime Minister's wife has passport returned, Spanish stock market slips following Trump's NATO comments, and more news from Spain on Thursday 9th July.
